name: IXOLIT Group
description: E-commerce and payment consulting group; parent company of IXOPAY orchestration platform.

seo.title: IXOLIT Group — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: IXOLIT Group: E-commerce and payment consulting group; parent company of IXOPAY orchestration platform.

when_to_use: Payment orchestration consulting and IXOPAY platform implementation
PSP strategy and e-commerce payment consulting for European merchants
Multi-acquirer orchestration architecture design and deployment
Payment vendor selection and integration project management for enterprises

pros: Parent of IXOPAY, an established orchestration platform
Long track record in European e-commerce payments
Consulting plus product reduces vendor shopping
cons: Brand split between group and IXOPAY confuses buyers
review.verdict: Experienced European orchestrator group, but most buyers should evaluate IXOPAY directly rather than the holding.
review.best_for: DACH and European merchants wanting a combined consulting plus orchestration engagement.
review.not_for: Teams looking for a single dev-first SaaS product with self-serve onboarding.
